final:
module combinational_logic (
        input u,
        input v,
        input w,
        output x);

assign x = (~u & v & ~w) |
           (~u & ~v & w) |
           (u & ~v & ~w) |
           (u & v & w);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      x <= ~u & ~v & ~w;
    end
  end

endmodule
